steps.title: Use embedded question form
steps.content: The phrase "to determine how much artificial sweetener" introduces an embedded question inside a statement. Embedded questions use normal word order, with the subject before the verb, and the whole sentence ends with a period.

steps.title: Reject direct-question syntax
steps.content: Choice A and Choice B use inverted order with "do most people prefer." Choice C has correct word order but incorrectly ends the statement with a question mark. The remaining choice has statement order and final period. The answer is D.
